Pete Drummond

Site Manager — Pilbara East

Straight-talking and practical Protective of his crew Skeptical of Perth-driven initiatives Calm under pressure Team-focused

Areas of Expertise

  • Open-pit iron ore mining operations
  • Haul truck fleet management
  • FIFO roster management
  • Autonomous haulage systems
  • Drill and blast operations
  • Dust and noise management
  • Team management and scheduling
  • Quality control and standards

For Other Topics

  • Operations: speak with Karen Whitfield
  • Safety: speak with Brooke Lawson
  • Hr: speak with Danielle Keenan

Schedule an Interview

You need to book an appointment before speaking with Pete Drummond.
